arts.ttl: Tottenham 0-1 Arsenal: Player ratings as Gabriel header settles north London derby
arts.sum: Kai Havertz had the visitors' first chance, rising high to head a cross towards the bottom corner, needing a save from Guglielmo Vicario and a block from Cristian Romero to keep the ball out. David Raya was forced into his first save of the game inside five minutes when Son Heung-min's cutback reached Dejan Kulusevski, who was denied at the near post by the Spanish goalkeeper.

arts.ttl: Tottenham are in a Groundhog Day loop - can Ange Postecoglou break the cycle?
arts.sum: Arsenal have now won three straight games at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, one more victory than Spurs have claimed at their Emirates Stadium home, despite giving their rivals a 13-year head start. Postecoglou bemoans that his side's biggest problems is their lack of clinical finishing, but that power isn't going to come back on again like turning on a tap - the goals won't flow because the chances aren't clear.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou delivers fiery assessment after north London derby defeat
arts.sum: The Spurs boss was also asked to give his assessment on the game, confirming that he does care about set pieces. Ange Postecoglou is confident that Tottenham Hotspur will succeed this season, despite falling to a 1-0 defeat to Arsenal in the north London derby .

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta offers update on Bukayo Saka injury after north London derby
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has opened up on Bukayo Saka's injury after the winger was forced to leave the pitch during Arsenal's 1-0 win over Tottenham Hotspur in the north London derby. "I made two changes with the front players and suddenly he's down," Arteta told reporters after the game when asked to reveal the outcome of Saka's injury.

arts.ttl: Paul Merson rubbishes Ange Postecoglou's trophy claim with brutal Strictly jibe
arts.sum: Former Arsenal star Paul Merson pulled no punches with his response after Tottenham manager Ange Postecoglou talked up his trophy chances with the North London club

arts.ttl: Premier League accused of trying to justify Declan Rice red card as new record set
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Declan Rice served a one-match suspension following his red card against Brighton and Hove Albion, but many more bookings followed this weekend

arts.ttl: Jamie O'Hara slams Tottenham after Arsenal defeat as he blames signing players from smaller clubs for poor performances
arts.sum: Jamie O'Hara was scathing in his assessment of Tottenham after Sunday's 1-0 defeat to Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Adrien Rabiot's next club confirmed after Arsenal, Man United transfer talk
arts.sum: Marseille confirm that they have an agreement in place to sign former Juventus midfielder Adrien Rabiot as a free agent on a two-year contract.

arts.ttl: Cristian Romero retweets post hitting out at Tottenham for not flying players back from international duty on a private jet after the Spurs defender was at fault for Arsenal's winner in derby
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: Travel responsibilities for international games lie with the national federations and Spurs were happy for Romero to return on the flights proposed by Argentina

arts.ttl: Paul Merson admits Gabriel's winner for Arsenal at Tottenham should not have stood
arts.sum: Arsenal defender Gabriel Magalhaes scored the only goal of the game to help the Gunners beat Tottenham but the North London derby winner was a controversial one
